movie.actors: Alec Baldwin, John Lone, Penelope Ann Miller, Peter Boyle
movie.genre: Action, Adventure, Crime, Fantasy, Mystery, Thriller
movie.plot: In 1930s New York City, the Shadow battles his nemesis, Shiwan Khan, who is building an atomic bomb.
movie.title: The Shadow
movie.writer: Walter B. Gibson (character The Shadow from stories), David Koepp
